title: Parkio Daily: Big Thunder Mountain Reopens with New Magic
teaser: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad reopens today at Magic Kingdom with new scenes and a lower height requirement. Star Wars Day merch launches tomorrow.

rides.name: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad
rides.note: Just reopened with new Rainbow Caverns scene

breaking.title: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad Reopens with New Magic
breaking.body: The iconic coaster reopened today at Magic Kingdom following a major refurbishment. New highlights include the Rainbow Caverns scene with phosphorescent pools and shimmering formations, plus new track and refreshed trains. The height requirement has been lowered to 38 inches.

bignews.title: Star Wars Day Merchandise Event Details Announced
bignews.body: Virtual queues will be required for the May 4th merchandise event at Disney's Hollywood Studios (opens 7 a.m.) and Disney Springs (opens 9 a.m.). Studios guests need valid park admission and reservations. Merchandise mobile checkout will be available in the My Disney Experience app.

spotlight.title: Ride Big Thunder Mountain Railroad Today
spotlight.body: After months of refurbishment, Big Thunder Mountain Railroad is back and better than ever. The classic attraction features enhanced storytelling around Barnabas T. Bullion and the Big Thunder Mountain Company, new technical upgrades for smoother rides, and the stunning new Rainbow Caverns scene. With the lowered height requirement of 38 inches, even more guests can experience the wildest ride in the wilderness.
